sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ عُمَرُ كِتَابًا قَدِيمًا فِي خِزَانَةِ جَدِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Omar je pronašao staru knjigu u djedovom ormaru.
sentences.translationEn: Omar found an old book in his grandfather's cupboard.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْكِتَابُ مَكْتُوبًا بِلُغَةٍ لَا يَعْرِفُهَا.
sentences.translation: Knjiga je bila napisana na jeziku koji nije znao.
sentences.translationEn: The book was written in a language he did not know.

sentences.translation: Odneo ga je svom učitelju u školu.
sentences.translationEn: He took it to his teacher at school.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأُسْتَاذُ: هَذِهِ قَصَائِدُ قَدِيمَةٌ جَمِيلَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Učitelj je rekao: Ovo su stare lijepe pjesme.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher said: These are beautiful old poems.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ عُمَرُ كَثِيرًا وَأَرَادَ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ تِلْكَ اللُّغَةَ.
sentences.translation: Omar se veoma obradovao i htio je naučiti taj jezik.
sentences.translationEn: Omar was very happy and wanted to learn that language.
